title: Version normalization statistics as a contract
description: Persist and version the means, scales, and vocabularies used to normalize features so serving applies the exact training-time transform.
body: Use when features are scaled, standardized, or vocabulary-encoded before the model. Do not recompute normalization statistics at serving time from live data — the serving distribution differs and the transform no longer matches training. Actions: fit statistics on the training fold, persist them as a versioned artifact bound to the model, and apply them unchanged online; verify the served transform reads the pinned stats. Validation signals include a normalization artifact versioned with the model and identical scaled values offline and online. Risk boundary: a mismatched transform is silent train/serve skew; if serving recomputes stats, treat it as a defect and bind the pinned artifact before release.
